programme.title: Chasing Dreams
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Chasing Dreams -Episode 2
programme.desc: A thrilling journey through Chasing Dreams, where every trail becomes a battleground for victory. From the peaks of the Basque Country to the routes of Chamonix, witness the determination of trail runners as they chase their dreams on the Golden Trail World Series.

programme.title: Chasing Dreams
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Chasing Dreams -Episode 3
programme.desc: A thrilling journey through Chasing Dreams, where every trail becomes a battleground for victory. From the peaks of the Basque Country to the routes of Chamonix, witness the determination of trail runners as they chase their dreams on the Golden Trail World Series.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 WOF 2025 #08: International Marathon Gorges de l’Ardèche
programme.desc: The Marathon International des Gorges de l'Ardèche is an annual canoe and kayak race in France. Participants navigate a 27-kilometre course through the breathtaking Ardèche Gorge.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E14 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 14, Gibraltar
programme.desc: This is it the last show before the world final. These guys have really got to fight for the points now, this is going to be action packed, whilst these guys fight it out all day.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E15 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 15, Turkey Part 1
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkey’s south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season of Strongman Champions League. Here in the sunshine, we’ll finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is. You could not ask for a better setting. After months of hard-work, if not years for some of these lads, we find out who will take the world title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E16 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 16, Turkey Part 1
programme.desc: Welcome, to day two of the strongman champions league 2022 finals here in Alanya, Turkey. It’s all up for grabs now, everyone is fighting for the world title belt. This is an epic episode where we finally crown the World champion of 2022.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E01 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 1 - Finland
programme.desc: Welcome to the 2023 Strongman Champions League in Vaasa, Finland! This year’s event introduces a knockout format with 6 intense events over 90 minutes, ending in a unique deadlift face-off with boats.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E02 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 2 - Serbia
programme.desc: Stage 2 of the Strongman Champions League 2023 is set in Zrenjanin, Serbia. This exciting event features 5 challenging contests, including a superhuman Yoke race. As the SCL World Series Tour continues, athletes will battle it out to claim the yellow leader’s position for the season. Don’t miss this incredible stage of strength and endurance!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E03 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3 - Finland Teams World
programme.desc: The World’s Strongest Team will be crowned in this edition of SCL, here in Kalajoki-Finland we’ve picked some of the best in the business, teamed them up, and they’ll be going all out against each other. It’s now no longer about being a lonely wolf, but more about the pack mentality. It is a competition over 7 events, including a Big 2-man Log lift and heavy deadlift. Let’s start the action.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E04 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 4 - Holland
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League in Holland at the Dru Factory in ULFT. A great location for a spectacular battle with 14 Athletes over 3 events! The first 3 events in this episode are Truckpull/ Superyoke and Farmerswalk, with 2 massive logs of 150 kg in their hands. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it’s the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E05 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 5 - Holland 2023
programme.desc: Ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, strongman fans across the world, we are back for SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it’s about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland, continues with the last 3 events, here at the Dru Factory in ULFT. The events in this episode are the Viking Press, Wheel Flip and the Atlas Stones, with 180 kg in the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E06 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the World’s Strongest Latino competition has begun. This two-day event in Porto, Portugal, features 20 athletes from around the world competing in 8 events. After 4 grueling events, the top 12 will advance to the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E07 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7 - Finland World Record Breakers
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League World Record Breakers 2023 starts with a 25-ton snow plow! Crazy machines are pulled and pushed, with many kilograms moved. A few new world records are set in this competition.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E08 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 8 - Portugal
programme.desc: We have returned to the powerhouse of Portugal for an edge-of-your-seat galactic battle. If all the planets collided at once, it wouldn’t compare to the bang of this show. Get ready for the battle of the beasts; it’s the heaviest show in the universe, the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E09 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 9 - England
programme.desc: SCL UK has landed in Gloucester it is workout war fitness for the ferocious, it’s going to be a a battle of the brutal, a rampage of the roofless. This is going to be a massacre of the muscles. You know it by now, but just in case you don’t, this is strongman champions league.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E10 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 10 - World's Strongest Viking
programme.desc: On the menu this week it’s medieval madness, we’ve come back to the middle ages to test our noble men through a muscle gaining of events. They are hoping and we are hoping that one will survive to take the title of the world’s strongest Viking. The official World's Strongest Viking is this time in Finland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E11 Stage 11 - SCL Poland 2023
programme.desc: This week is a good one, can you feel the energy? Sit still, just look at me and try and feel the energy, because I can tell you, the atmosphere here is electric, it’s explosive, there is a pure elemental force going through these athletes' veins. I’m shaking because it’s Poland, it’s powerful, it’s strongman champions league, and you know what I'm going to say, get ready because it’s about to get heavy.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E12 Stage 12 - SCL Poland 2023
programme.desc: SCL Poland part 2 - Who will win the title in Poland and take 25 points for the world ranking. It is very exciting on the top, in part 1 between Poland and Latvia. Another great episode with super strongman events such as: Bag Toss Medley, Log Lift Reps and the Powerstairs. Also an interview with Mateusz Kieloszkowski, the all time favorite champion from Poland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E13 Stage 13 - SCL Cyprus 2023
programme.desc: It’s time to show our strength and gain respect from the gods of Olympus. Our gladiators have many events set out by no other than Hercules himself. The coliseum is ready here on this mythological island of Cyprus, so we have landed in Limassol were again 12 Top Strongmen are battling for the title and ranking points.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E14 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 14 - South Africa
programme.desc: The only and official world championship Truckpulling for its 10th year, again at the Strongman Champions league. With the 3 times Worldchampion Kelvin de Ruiter – defending his title. This championship has trucks in all shapes and sizes which is a lot like our athletes, there all different pay loads, but does the biggest win or is it the strongest.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E15 Stage 15 - SCL World Finals Bosnia
programme.desc: Years and years of determination has brought us here today, when all the walls felt like they were caving in perseverance. When their bodies were screaming, hurting, shouting stop, beneath. These are the things which make up a man, these are the things that bring you world finalists. This episode they fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E16 Stage 16 - SCL World Finals Bosnia
programme.desc: Part 2 of the World Finals of the Strongman Champions League tour 2023 at the Sarajevo Centar Skenderija in Bosnia. 3 Events was done already and amazing results have been set. Who will be the new World champion? Find out here, who, after 16 stages, will be crowned World Champion 2023.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 1, Martinique
programme.desc: The Strongman Champions League kicks off its 2014 season in Martinique.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 2, Germany FIBO Power
programme.desc: The second stage of 2014 Strongman champions League, in Cologne, Germany. 14 athletes from 12 different countries battled through six events on the second stop

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E09 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 9, Finland (Part 2)
programme.desc: The fight for the Finnish trophy continues. In this unmissable SCL event, the strongmen battle for the win in the Carry and Drag, the Forward Hold, Deadlifting with Cars and the Loading Race. Belsak, Radzikowski and Zageris look good after the first day, but the others haven’t given up yet.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E10 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 10, Finland Lightweight World Championship
programme.desc: This under 105kg category event is the ultimate preparation for up-and-coming strongman athletes before entering the heavy class. The Lightweight World Championship is a special every year in the SCL calendar as it sees new talents rise and many promising athletes who are gearing up for future tournaments. A total of 25 athletes from 16 different countries make their way to Kokkola, Finland

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E11 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 11, Romania
programme.desc: Situated in the very heart of the Carpathian Mountains, Sibiu is a Romanian town where the climate is pleasantly mild, offering some of the best weather conditions for a strongman event around Europe. All this, without doubt, set the mood for the high results and showtime vibes in Stage 11 of Strongman Champions League. The competition in Sibiu was organized in six different disciplines

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E12 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 12, Curacao
programme.desc: From now on every stage of these series will be more than crucial. Curacao is a beautiful Dutch island in the Caribbean, with a great atmosphere to hold another stage of the MLO Strongman Champions League. Let’s see who takes the title here and who will secure a place in the next stage.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E13 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 13, Jordan
programme.desc: Ten of the world’s strongest men gathered in Amman to compete in Jordan’s first-ever Truck-Pull Championship. The contestants race against the clock while pulling a 21-ton truck across the track. One of the most fierce competitors to take part in the event was four-time winner of the World’s Strongest Man competition, Brian Shaw.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E14 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 14, Greece
programme.desc: Taking place in Corinth, Greece, considered by many the cradle of the sports competition games, an epic strongman battle will mark the last stage before the upcoming big two-day season’s finale in Chetumal, Mexico. In front of more than 5000 spectators, the twelve athletes compete in Log Lifts, Card Deadlift, Conan’s Wheel and Loading.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E15 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 15, Mexico World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: The first day of the two-part finale sees the strongest men competing in Carry and Drag, Dumbbell Lift and the Truck Pull. Everything is possible in this heated fight for the crown against the backdrop of stunning Chetumal, Mexico.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E16 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 16, Mexico World Finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: On the second day of the grand finale of the 2017 Strongman Champions League, the athletes have a last chance to secure the medals in the spectacular four events Weight for Height, Deadlift Cars, Forward Hold and The Loading Medley. Be prepared for stunning performances – and even world records!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E01 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 1, Norway - World Strongest Viking
programme.desc: Season 2018 begins with 14 strongest men in the world, all competing for the title. The competition kicks off in Norway. We’ll see typical Viking disciplines, team events and world records in heavy conditions in the land of snow and ice. They will suffer, they will freeze and fight in this first competition of the year for the title that they will carry on their shoulders throughout whole year.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E02 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 2, Germany - FIBO Power
programme.desc: The next stop in strongest league of the world is muscle capital, largest number of strong shoulders per capichampions league on the planet. It’s a FIBO - the biggest expo on planet Earth and the second stage of 2018 Strongman champions league, in Cologne, Germany.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E03 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 3, Abu Dhabi
programme.desc: For the first time in history, Strongman Champions League will set up competition in Abu Dhabi. The line-up of super athletes, who are part of the SCL, includes former world champions Dainis Zageris (Latvia) & Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland), current world champion Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and biggest strongman in the World Sean O’Hagan (Ireland).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E04 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 4, Holland (Part 1)
programme.desc: Strongman classic in land where there is no place for anything else excepts strength, fight and endurance. Here are fourteen of the strongest men, fighting for the title of strongest in Holland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E05 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 5, Holland (Part 2)
programme.desc: We go back to Holland, where former champion Dainis Zageris is in leading position after the first three events. Alongside Radzikowski, he is in this moment favorite for world title, and also leader shirt holder.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E06 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 6, Finland
programme.desc: Stage six of Strongman champions league, 2018 is set back on north, in Finland. Here we have Matjaz Belsak, wearing SCL leader shirt, one of the biggest strongman in the World Mika Torro, fan favorite strongman in all over the World – Will Baggott, and also big name from Baltic – Aivars Smaukstelis

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E07 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 7, Serbia
programme.desc: Twelve strongman, including defending Worldchampion Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia , will compete on “Air spa” for the title of best in homeland country of Tesla, Pupin, Novak Djokovic. Matjaz Belsak is the SCL leader in this competition, chasing his third victory this season.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E08 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 8, Finland - U105 (Part 1)
programme.desc: The World championship in lightweights of the Strongman Champions League bring to us 50 strongmen from all over the world. All athletes are under 105 kilograms and for them this is the step up to the ultimate heavyweights.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E09 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 9, Finland - U105 (Part 2)
programme.desc: In this second stage of the World championship of lightweights we will find out who out of the 12 athletes will win the title in the under 105 kilogram category.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E10 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 10, Romania (Part 1)
programme.desc: The first part of SCL Romania 2018 will be hosted in Brasov. This episode features a new event for Strongman Champion League: “ The Chopper Pull”!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E11 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 11, Romania (Part 2)
programme.desc: After three classical Strongman events – Dead lift, Loading and Front hold – and one historical, Chopper Pull for the first time in history of Strongman, now we go to find out who will take title in Romania. This is the second stage in Romania and it remains to be seen who will win the title; Aivars, Travis or Krzyzstof?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E12 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 12, Curacao (Part 1)
programme.desc: The next destination of Strongman Champions League is in a piece of paradise on earth – Curacao. We bring to you some special Strongman events like the Rock Lift, Tug of War and Weight for Height in this episode.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E13 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 13, Curacao (Part 2)
programme.desc: This is the last competition before the grand finals. After the first three events Zageris is in top place, but can O’Hagan, Baggott, Petursson and Ortmayer step into the final? Last chance some of them will find through events like Forward Hold, Truck Pull, Dead Lift and loading very big objects.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E14 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 14, Road to Mexico
programme.desc: We bring you 50 minutes of Strongman inside. Fears, inspiration, courage, the best and worst from our finalists and their expectation of the finals. We also go to Poland and Germany to represent one day in the training of Krzysztof Radzikowski and Dennis Kohlruss. See all the finalists for Mexico in their comfort zone here, with their backgrounds /motivations /family and friends.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S05 : E15 SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 15, Mexico - World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: The first part of the Strongman Champions League 2018 finals in Mexico. The last twelve athletes all pushing their boundaries and testing their limits to take the World title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E08 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 8, Finland (Part 1)
programme.desc: Stages 8 and 9 of the SCL are hosted in Vaasa, Finland, taking place over a spectacular two-day event. After 3 wins so far, Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia plans to extend his lead at the top of the table. Among the other 13 highly motivated strongmen, two SCL legends will make their comeback to the competition: Former World Champion of 2015, Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland) and Dainis Zageris (Latvia).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E09 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 9, Finland (Part 2)
programme.desc: The fight for the Finnish trophy continues. Belsak, Radzikowski and Zageris look good after the first day, but the others haven’t given up yet.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E09 COLLISION 7
programme.desc: In the main event, ‘The King of Kickboxing’ Rico Verhoeven put his GLORY world heavyweight title on the line against number one contender ‘The Prince’ Levi Rigters in a hotly anticipated rematch from their GLORY Grand Prix final earlier this year. GLORY light heavyweight world champion Tarik Khbabez will collide with Donegi Abena in a trilogy fight to end their heated rivalry in the co-main event.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E01 GLORY 98 Rotterdam
programme.desc: GLORY 98 features the highly anticipated return of Jamal Ben Saddik (36-9, 29 KO) against the Estonian powerhouse Uku Jürjendal (20-9, 16 KO). In the co-main event of the evening, GLORY Welterweight World Champion Chico Kwasi (43-5-1, 23 KO) is set to defend his title against number two ranked welterweight Teodor Hristov (18-3, 7 KO). Meanwhile, two of 2024’s best prospects will clash as Cem Caceres (18-1, 14 KO) faces Mory Kromah (31-2-1, 18 KO).

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E09 COLLISION 7
programme.desc: In the main event, ‘The King of Kickboxing’ Rico Verhoeven put his GLORY world heavyweight title on the line against number one contender ‘The Prince’ Levi Rigters in a hotly anticipated rematch from their GLORY Grand Prix final earlier this year. GLORY light heavyweight world champion Tarik Khbabez will collide with Donegi Abena in a trilogy fight to end their heated rivalry in the co-main event.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E01 GLORY 98 Rotterdam
programme.desc: GLORY 98 features the highly anticipated return of Jamal Ben Saddik (36-9, 29 KO) against the Estonian powerhouse Uku Jürjendal (20-9, 16 KO). In the co-main event of the evening, GLORY Welterweight World Champion Chico Kwasi (43-5-1, 23 KO) is set to defend his title against number two ranked welterweight Teodor Hristov (18-3, 7 KO). Meanwhile, two of 2024’s best prospects will clash as Cem Caceres (18-1, 14 KO) faces Mory Kromah (31-2-1, 18 KO).

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E07 GLORY 95 Zagreb
programme.desc: A five-round heavyweight title eliminator between the number one ranked contender Levi Rigters (18-2, 8 KO) and ‘The Golden Wolf’ Bahram Rajabzadeh (69-3, 61 KO). The winner will face ‘The King of Kickboxing’ Rico Verhoeven (64-10, 21 KO) on December 7 in the main event of COLLISION 7. In the co-main event of the evening, Tariq ‘Cookie’ Osaro (25-4-1, 13 KO) clashes with Nico ‘Big Sexy’ Horta (23-9, 3 KO) in a monster heavyweight clash with big implication for the rankings. Croatian kickboxing legend Mladen Brestovac (55-14-1, 37 KO) will make his final walk to the ring in his hometown of Zagreb. ‘The Scorpion Sting’ will take on newcomer Karim Dian (16-13, 3 KO) to cap off an illustrious...

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E08 GLORY 96 Rotterdam
programme.desc: A Champ vs. Champ superfight takes place in the main event as GLORY welterweight world champion Chico Kwasi (43-5, 23 KO) puts his title on the line against GLORY lightweight world champ Tyjani Beztati (27-4, 9 KO). In the co-main event, Donovan Wisse (21-1, 10 KO) aims to defend his GLORY middleweight world championship for a fifth time when he welcomes the challenge of top German Sergej Braun (44-13, 27 KO).

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E07 GLORY 95 Zagreb
programme.desc: A five-round heavyweight title eliminator between the number one ranked contender Levi Rigters (18-2, 8 KO) and ‘The Golden Wolf’ Bahram Rajabzadeh (69-3, 61 KO). The winner will face ‘The King of Kickboxing’ Rico Verhoeven (64-10, 21 KO) on December 7 in the main event of COLLISION 7. In the co-main event of the evening, Tariq ‘Cookie’ Osaro (25-4-1, 13 KO) clashes with Nico ‘Big Sexy’ Horta (23-9, 3 KO) in a monster heavyweight clash with big implication for the rankings. programme.desc: Anjali loves Raja, a budding musician, and confides about him to her elder sister Aarti. Aarti assures to get them married but dies delivering twin girls. Anjali is now forced to marry Aarti's husband, Aditya.

programme.title: Behan Hogi Teri
programme.desc: In the city of Lucknow, Gattu, a jobless UPSC aspirant falls in love with Binny, a girl who lives in his neighbourhood but doesn't pay much attention to him because she finds him a coward. Gattu's desire to marry Binny puts him in a situation where he has to not just face off with a family of criminals who want to make Binny their daughter-in-law but also gather the courage to convince his parents and neighbours that all boys and girls living in the same neighbourhood are not brothers and sisters.

programme.title: Mehek
programme.sub-title: S03 : E120 Mehek S3 E120
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Dhamaal
programme.desc: Dhamaal is a 2007 comedy film featuring four quirky, unemployed friends—Roy, Adi, Manav, and Boman—who stumble upon a dying man's secret about a hidden treasure in Goa. Eager to change their fortunes, they set off on a wild, chaotic journey to find it. Along the way, they encounter hilarious challenges and absurd situations. However, they aren’t alone in the race—Inspector Kabir, a greedy cop, is also after the treasure and determined to beat them to it. What follows is a madcap adventure full of gags, misadventures, and comic twists as everyone scrambles to strike it rich.

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.sub-title: S04 : E73 Jodha Akbar S4 E73
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: Double Dhamaal
programme.desc: Four men - Aditya, Boman, Manav, and Deshbandhu - are broke after losing money to officer Kabir Nayak. Learning of Kabir's affair with Gulabo, they plan to blackmail him. Enlisting gangster-turned-Sadhu Bata Bhai, they fail and flee to Macau. There, they encounter Kabir, now a casino owner, and plot their revenge.

programme.desc: Trinayani is a woman who can see the future. She decides to use her power to make other peoples lives better. How will things turn out for her when people learn about her extraordinary abilities?

programme.title: Guddan
programme.sub-title: S02 : E28 Guddan S2 E28
programme.desc: Guddan, a cheerful yet clumsy young woman, ends up marrying Akshat Jindal aka AJ, a rich businessman with three sons and daughters-in-law. How will Guddan face the challenges that await her?

programme.title: Undercover Love
programme.sub-title: S01 : E385 Undercover Love S1 E385
programme.desc: Behind the facade of running an NGO for hearing and speech impaired children, the demure Jagadhatri Sanyal is, in reality, a fiery intelligence officer code-named JAS.

programme.title: Gangaaa
programme.sub-title: S01 : E75 Gangaa S2 E75
programme.desc: Gangaa, a child widow, faces numerous hardships while living in a community of ultra-conservative people. However, with a blend of charm and bravery, she challenges outdated traditions.

programme.title: Mehek
programme.sub-title: S03 : E125 Mehek S3 E125
programme.desc: The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Maitree
programme.sub-title: S01 : E140 Maitree: The Rules of Love S1 E140
programme.desc: The lives of three friends, Nandini, Maitree and Ashish get inexplicably intertwined when an accident brings unexpected changes in their lives.

programme.title: King of Hearts
programme.sub-title: S01 : E386 King of Hearts S1 E386
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances
programme.sub-title: S01 : E386 Second Chances S1 E386
programme.desc: Yash, a rich and esteemed business tycoon, yearns for real love. While he falls in love with Neha, the journey ahead is not going to be an easy one for him. Will he be able to win Nehas heart?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.sub-title: S04 : E78 Jodha Akbar S4 E78
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: This is Fate
programme.sub-title: S02 : E38 This is Fate S2 E38
programme.desc: The story revolves around the two sisters of Pragya, from Kumkum Bhagya. Her sisters are Preeta and Shristhi who discover the existence of their mother Sarla and sister Pragya, after their father’s death. The sisters try to unite with their mother and sister.

programme.title: Trinayani
programme.sub-title: S01 : E386 Trinayani S1 E386
programme.desc: Trinayani is a woman who can see the future. She decides to use her power to make other peoples lives better. How will things turn out for her when people learn about her extraordinary abilities?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.sub-title: S04 : E78 Jodha Akbar S4 E78
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: This is Fate
programme.sub-title: S02 : E38 This is Fate S2 E38
programme.desc: The story revolves around the two sisters of Pragya, from Kumkum Bhagya. Her sisters are Preeta and Shristhi who discover the existence of their mother Sarla and sister Pragya, after their father’s death. The sisters try to unite with their mother and sister.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Alois Ruf
programme.desc: Alois Ruf is the founder of a small, but well-known car manufacturing company in Bavaria that specialises in building their own vision of street legal super sports cars on the foundation of Porsche bodys.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Henry Ford
programme.desc: In the early 20th century, automotive pioneer Henry Ford revolutionized the world of car manufacturing with the foundation of the Ford Motor Company and his introduction of the assembly line technique in his factory and the iconic Model T.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Rally Sport 1983
programme.desc: In 1983 Audi introduced the Quattro 4x4 drive to the rally world, adding a new dimension to rally racing. The races became tougher and more brutal. The strain on drivers, vehicles and mechanics alike was extremely intense.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Rallye Sport 1984
programme.desc: In Europe and Africa in 1984, the rally veterans and drifting artists, Hannu Mikkola, Walter Roehrl, Bjoern Waldegaard, Marku Alen and the rally amazon, Michele Mouton, fought fiercly for the World Championship title.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 50 Years Jaguar E-Type
programme.desc: A legend celebrates its 50th anniversary. In 1961 the Jaguar E-Type was shown for the first time at the Geneva International Motor Show.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Mercedes 300 SL Gullwing
programme.desc: The Mercedes 300SL might be the most exciting sports car of the post-war era. It was even named sports car of the century. Hans Kleissl owns one of the world's leading repair and restoration shops for SL models.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E193 Open Air Feeling
programme.desc: The Mercedes-AMG C43 was supposed to act as the entry-level model to the brand's cabriolet world. With the 718 Boxster, Porsche offers a convertible at a competitive price as well.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Melkus RS 1000
programme.desc: The Melkus RS 1000 is considered the Ferrari of the East. The extremely flat two-seater with its mid-engine and gullwing doors was the only real sports car ever built in the GDR and is hardly known outside the former country's borders.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E25 Innovations
programme.desc: Duel of the city runabouts: the Audi A1 Quattro versus the Renault Clio RS. Also: the Morgan Plus 8 roadster with its combination of retro design and modern tech. And: the Swiss think-tank Rinspeed's vision of tomorrow's big city traffic.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Crazy Rides
programme.desc: In 2006, Peraves presented their MonoTracer, a cabin motorcycle with immense power and an electric drive option. Also: the three-wheeler Carver One combines motorcycle and car specs. And: two unusual rides, a Mini hot rod and the Reliant Rialto.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E45 Sporty All Wheelers
programme.desc: At the Monza Rally Show, motorsport superstars compete against each other on the legendary Formula 1 race track. Also: the powerful and sporty Mercedes GLE Coupé is the answer to the BMW X6. And: the facelift of the Nissan Juke.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Mercedes ML 63 AMG
programme.desc: We put the Porsche Cayenne Turbo S and the Mercedes ML 63 AMG to the test. Also: the final round of the truck trial race at the Camp4fun at the Nürburgring in Germany. And: General Motors' new luxury SUV, the Cadillac SRX.

programme.title: Made in ...
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 BMW motorcycle production
programme.desc: Sheer Driving Pleasure: That’s how BMW advertises not only its cars, but its motorcycles as well. For more than 40 years, these 2-wheelers have stood for maximum comfort, quality, and safety.

programme.title: Made in ...
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Mechatronics
programme.desc: Pleidelsheim, near Stuttgart. The Mechatronik company specialises in classics from Mercedes. Since 1997, engineers, electricians and mechanics has dedicated itself to the restoration and refinement of classic models.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Walter Röhrl
programme.desc: One cannot talk about rally sports without mentioning the name Walter Röhrl. From an early age, Röhrl showed his talent in rally sports and won the European, World and other international rally championships several times in his career.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Ferruccio Lamborghini
programme.desc: In 1964, Ferruccio Lamborghini set himself the goal to build the best sports cars in the world, a bold move, being located only a few kilometers from Ferrari.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S05 : E07 All-Wheel Vans
programme.desc: With the 2 Series Gran Tourer all-wheel van, like, for example, the 220 xDrive, BMW wants families to experience the joy of driving. The Seat Alhambra offers a practical sliding door and a lot of space in the back. Also: the luxurious V-Class by Mercedes.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Wildly through the desert
programme.desc: BMW and the German racing team X-Raid take part in the Dakar Rally with a transformed Mini Countryman. Also: the Mercedes G63 AMG 6x6, a 6-wheel off-road monster. And: the Kia Sportage feels both at home in the rocky terrain of Sicily and the city.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E30 Best-selling sporty Coupés
programme.desc: Coupes are still bestsellers. In the Audi RS7 the Mercedes CLS 63 AMG and BMW M6 Gran Coupe got a new challenger. In addition: is the BMW 4 Series Coupe a spin-off of the successful 3 Series model? And: the rather unusual Hyundai Veloster.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E33 Sportscars for the Masses
programme.desc: The Ford Mustang has been an icon for decades. What makes this car so special? In addition: the Nissan 370 Z Nismo is half as expensive as a Porsche 911, but its power is on par with the German flagship. And: the 7th generation Volkswagen Golf GTI and R.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 KTM 990 Adventure
programme.desc: The big KTM 990 Adventure is Austria’s answer to BMW's bestselling R 1200 GS. Is KTM's allrounder for streets, gravel roads and long distance travels a worthy opponent for the dominating Bavarian bike? Also: travel enduros are put to the test as we accompany two German adventurers on their 31-day, 5800-kilometre bike tour through Thailand, Laos and Cambodia.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 Enduro Park Hechlingen
programme.desc: The BMW Enduro Park Hechlingen in Bavaria offers off-road driving pleasure both for beginners and pros alike on 26 hectares. We take a look at what this exciting place has to offer for enduro enthusiasts. Also: what does the inexpensive Hyosung ST 700 i from South Korea have to offer? And: the big-wheeled scooter from Taiwan, the Kymco People GT 300i.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E42 Unique Models and Million-Sellers
programme.desc: Aston Martin usually triggers thoughts of James Bond and expensive sports cars. But the British luxury brand also offers sedans like the 1976 Aston Martin Lagonda Shooting Brake. An Aston fan turned his into to a station wagon.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E53 Royal Cars
programme.desc: The Bentley S2 Continental Flying Spur, a drivers' car with Rolls Royce genes. In addition: Joseph Stalin's ZIS 110, a Soviet reverse-engineered Packard Super Eight. And: the Rolls Royce Silver Wraith, the British luxury vehicle for the Belgian king.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E34 Goodwood Revival, Part 1
programme.desc: The Name 'Goodwood' gives fans of historic racing cars goose bumps. It's the biggest and most beloved event for fast vintage cars. We show you the most spectacular races from the Goodwood Circuit.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Ron Williams and his Cadillac
programme.desc: The 1952 Cadillac Fleetwood is also known as the American Rolls-Royce, because it’s the car of celebrities, presidents, millionaires and mafia bosses. One owner of this rare classic car is German-American actor and entertainer Ron Williams.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E40 Handmade roadsters
programme.desc: Wiesmann, Roding, Artega, these names represent small automotive manufacturers where hand-crafted vehicles are produced in low volumes. We took a look at some of these exclusive sports cars.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E44 The battle - cheap vs. Expensive
programme.desc: The Dacia Logan MCV is a very affordable station wagon. We made a cheap vs. expensive comparison between the Logan and the Golf Variant, the supermini cars Audi A1 quattro and Renault Clio R.S. and the Korean SUVs SsangYong Rexton and Hyundai Santa Fe.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E182 High Voltage
programme.desc: With its extreme power and performance the Croatian super car Rimac Concept One opened the door to an exciting new world. Also: the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG Coupe Electric Drive. And: Tesla's impressive Model S series.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E134 Extravagance Times Four
programme.desc: Porsche presented their Panamera 4 S with a 6-cylinder instead of a V8. Jaguar reinvented itself with the XJ, offering modern technology in a fancy dress. And: the first all-electric luxury sedan that redefined electric mobility, Tesla's Model S.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Bike Crash
programme.desc: This time the team deals with motorbike stunts: high jumps, risky drops and dangerous crashes in the company's backyard. Stunt coordinator Domi requires his specialists to be in top shape and extremely focused.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 The Ambulance
programme.desc: Stunt coordinator Domi’s latest idea for the Stunt Heroes team involves an old ambulance that is prepared so that the stuntman can jump right through the ambulance with his car.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Episode 20
programme.desc: At the old-timer grand prix at the Nuerburgring you for example can see the Mercedes S with 160 horsepower that lead Rudolf Caracciola to victory in the 1927 opening race.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Episode 18
programme.desc: After the 24-hour race was over we left the Nuerburgring and moved to Büren, Germany, where the Raeder Motorsport company is based. They are famous for front-wheel drives with a great performance that put a lot of horsepower to the track.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E159 Luxury 2.0
programme.desc: Lexus was one of the pioneers when it comes to electric and hybrid cars. The brand's LS 600h, the BMW Active Hybrid 7 and the Porsche Panamera S E-Hybrid are prime examples of this mixture between combustion and electric propulsion.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E120 When Sports Meets Indulgence
programme.desc: Luxury class grand tourers with four doors. Porsche introduced their Panamera as a Plugin Hybrid or equipped with new turbo engines. BMW responded with their M6 Gran Coupe. German engineering at its finest.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E81 Porsche Cayman R
programme.desc: Not only Porsche fans will like the sportiest Cayman model. Also: with the Juke-R, Nissan combined a GT-R sports car and a crossover. And: the BMW G-Power is the fastest station wagon on this planet.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 Triumph Speed Triple Carbon
programme.desc: Suzuki's all-rounder flagship, the V-Strom, underwent a rejuvenation treatment. Will the new V-Strom 650 be able to surpass its versatile predecessors? Also: does the use of carbon make sense in the manufacturing of motorcycles? And: a bike tour on the Deutsche Alpenstraße, the German Alpine Road, in the footsteps of Bavaria's fairy tale king Ludwig II.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 KTM 990 Adventure
programme.desc: The big KTM 990 Adventure is Austria’s answer to BMW's bestselling R 1200 GS. Is KTM's allrounder for streets, gravel roads and long distance travels a worthy opponent for the dominating Bavarian bike? Also: travel enduros are put to the test as we accompany two German adventurers on their 31-day, 5800-kilometre bike tour through Thailand, Laos and Cambodia.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Episode 18
programme.desc: After the 24-hour race was over we left the Nuerburgring and moved to Büren, Germany, where the Raeder Motorsport company is based. They are famous for front-wheel drives with a great performance that put a lot of horsepower to the track.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Episode 17
programme.desc: The RCN Challenge is the ultimate BMW driving experience. We also paid a visit to the Devils Diner, the track's indoor meeting place for drivers.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E59 German Race Car Classics
programme.desc: We present to you historic image and film documents from the Porsche 550 RS Spyder. And: how the Audi Quattro shocked its competitors with its driving dynamics.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E44 Arabella Classics
programme.desc: The Arabella Classics is one of the most exclusive classic car rallies in Europe. We took part in a rare BMW 502. Plus: The Lamborghini Diablo GT and the Volkswagen Bus T2 Westfalia are put to the test.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E39 Pony Cars - the American Way of Drive
programme.desc: In 1964, the first Ford Mustang saw the light of day, and its sales surpassed all expectations. Following this iconic car's 50th anniversary we explored if the contemporary Mustang was still the benchmark in its class, compared to its competitors.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Moment of Force
programme.desc: Dennis Rostek races the Mathilda Racing GT-R1 at the Nürburgring Nordschleife. Also: the two sons of racing legend Hans-Joachim Stuck take the BMW 550d to the test track. And: could the Volkswagen Golf 7 be a suitable Bond car?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E160 Road Stars
programme.desc: The Silvretta Hochalpenstrasse in Austria is the ideal playground for the lightweight power packs Lotus Elise and Roding Roadster. Also: the elegant but still very powerful Porsche 911 Targa 4S.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E121 On Patrol with the Dubai Police Supercars
programme.desc: The Dubai police's fleet of patrol cars includes a Chevrolet Camaro, a Lamborghini Aventador, a Bentley GT, a Ferrari FF and more. For the first time ever, their Special Cars Unit allowed a TV crew a glimpse behind the curtain.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Episode 19
programme.desc: The roaring sounds of engines and exhausts usually dominate the Nuerburgring, but we focused on something a bit quieter this time. How about taking part in a 15 mile bike ride around the ring, or perhaps a 16 mile run?

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Episode 21
programme.desc: In this episode, we focused on Phoenix Racing, the successful team from the Eifel Region that rocked the DTM.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 BMW X6M vs Nissan Patrol
programme.desc: At Jumeirah Beach in Dubai, car owners can have their souped-up vehicles judged in three categories and win an overnight stay at the Sofitel Hotel. This time, a BMW X6M, a Ford F250 and a Nissan Patrol are in the running.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Lamborghini Aventador vs GMC Chevrolet
programme.desc: The "Walk" at JBR in Dubai is the venue for our competition, as far as fancy and luxurious cars from all over the Middle East are concerned. This time, a Lamborghini Aventador and a GMC Chevrolet are among the participants.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E103 Asian Bestsellers
programme.desc: The Lexus IS-F, Nissan's GTR and Juke R and the Infiniti FX 50 are rather exotic models. Not only the futuristic design but also the performance of these Asian power packs made European car manufacturers quiver in their boots.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E141 Jaguar RS
programme.desc: Jaguar succeeded in finding new confidence and challenging their competitors with models like the XF-RS, XK-RS and F-Type. We took a look at the iconic British brand's latest developments.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Ford Mustang vs Chevy Corvette
programme.desc: Car lovers from the Middle East present their vehicles at the Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. There is a weekend at the hotel to be won. A Ford Mustang and a limited edition Chevrolet Corvette are up for judging this time.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Mercedes SLS vs Audi R8
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi once again invite the owners of the most extraordinary cars to Dubai, where they award points for speed, style and sound. This time, they will be joined by a limited edition Mercedes SLS and an Audi R8.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Episode 22
programme.desc: At the Nuerburgring Patrick chased a 12-cylinder Aston Martin Zagato down the track. Also on the show: a Hummer, a Renault Clio and a Frenchman in a Ferrari.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Episode 20
programme.desc: At the old-timer grand prix at the Nuerburgring you for example can see the Mercedes S with 160 horsepower that lead Rudolf Caracciola to victory in the 1927 opening race.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E32 V8 Bangers
programme.desc: The V8 engine: strong, bursting with power and blessed with a sound that gives you goose bumps. The British TVR 5000's engine comes from the Ford Mustang, and the car's overall low weight promises an exhilarating driving experience.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 AMC Cobra Pacer
programme.desc: The rare AMC Pacer featured in the movie Wayne's World is a real eye catcher. This car caught the attention of famous German music manager Andreas Laesker.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E54 Hybrids
programme.desc: Some people claim that hybrid cars are neither fish nor fowl. Audi's reaction was the A3 e-tron. The all-electric BMW i3 went a step further, offering a range extender. Also: the Mitsubishi Outlander, the first plug-in hybrid SUV in the world.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E30 Best-selling sporty Coupés
programme.desc: Coupes are still bestsellers. In the Audi RS7 the Mercedes CLS 63 AMG and BMW M6 Gran Coupe got a new challenger. In addition: is the BMW 4 Series Coupe a spin-off of the successful 3 Series model? And: the rather unusual Hyundai Veloster.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Rally Year 1972 - A Ford success story
programme.desc: The International Championship for Manufacturers was a rally series which was run from 1970 to 1972. Car manufacturers such as Porsche, Renault, Opel and Ford took part in this competition, with Ford having an exceptionally successful year in 1972.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 German Touring Car Championship 1992
programme.desc: The Deutsche Tourenwagen Meisterschaft was one of the most important racing series in German motorsports. It was difficult, tough and well-known for its die-hard battles between the international competitors. We present the highlights of the 1992 race.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E49 Bizzarrini 5300 GT
programme.desc: Giotto Bizzarrini was the creator of the famous Ferrari GTO, but after arguments with his employer he left Ferrari early. To get back at Ferrari, Bizzarrini decided to create his own sports car: the Bizzarrini GT 5300.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E58 Luxurious coupes with 12 cylinders
programme.desc: The 1973 Jaguar XJC's V12 engine purrs like a kitten and growls like a wild cat. In addition: the high-tech luxury coupe BMW 850. And: in the 1960s the Ferrari 250 GTE wrote racing history. We took this sportster to the test track.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 German Rallye Championship 1983
programme.desc: Since its premiere in 1970 the Deutsche Rallye Meisterschaft has been one of the most popular motorsports series. In the 1983 competition Opel's Manta, Kadett and Ascona sports models celebrated exceptional successes.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Audi Quattro - The new Dimension, 1985
programme.desc: In 1985 Audi made their impressive mark in motorsports with the Quattro. With its 4x4 drive this model impressed the audience and shocked the competition alike and ushered in a new era in rally sports.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Alois Ruf
programme.desc: Alois Ruf is the founder of a small, but well-known car manufacturing company in Bavaria that specialises in building their own vision of street legal super sports cars on the foundation of Porsche bodys.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Henry Ford
programme.desc: In the early 20th century, automotive pioneer Henry Ford revolutionized the world of car manufacturing with the foundation of the Ford Motor Company and his introduction of the assembly line technique in his factory and the iconic Model T.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Rally Sport 1983
programme.desc: In 1983 Audi introduced the Quattro 4x4 drive to the rally world, adding a new dimension to rally racing. The races became tougher and more brutal. The strain on drivers, vehicles and mechanics alike was extremely intense.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Rallye Sport 1984
programme.desc: In Europe and Africa in 1984, the rally veterans and drifting artists, Hannu Mikkola, Walter Roehrl, Bjoern Waldegaard, Marku Alen and the rally amazon, Michele Mouton, fought fiercly for the World Championship title.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 50 Years Jaguar E-Type
programme.desc: A legend celebrates its 50th anniversary. In 1961 the Jaguar E-Type was shown for the first time at the Geneva International Motor Show.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Mercedes 300 SL Gullwing
programme.desc: The Mercedes 300SL might be the most exciting sports car of the post-war era. It was even named sports car of the century. Hans Kleissl owns one of the world's leading repair and restoration shops for SL models.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 MG TC
programme.desc: The MG TC is a sporty, but also extremely spartan car with technology from the late 1940s. We accompanied the owner of a MG TC on his way to pass the TÜV, the German technical certification test.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Melkus RS 1000
programme.desc: The Melkus RS 1000 is considered the Ferrari of the East. The extremely flat two-seater with its mid-engine and gullwing doors was the only real sports car ever built in the GDR and is hardly known outside the former country's borders.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Fiat Dino
programme.desc: The Fiat Dino Spider is one of the most beautiful cabriolets of the 1960s. Its impeccable design was created by Pininfarina, and only 525 units were built. Under its hood growls a Ferrari V6 engine.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E49 Bizzarrini 5300 GT
programme.desc: Giotto Bizzarrini was the creator of the famous Ferrari GTO, but after arguments with his employer he left Ferrari early. To get back at Ferrari, Bizzarrini decided to create his own sports car: the Bizzarrini GT 5300.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E60 French Classics
programme.desc: French manufacturers have also built milestones in automotive history in the past, including lesser-known brands such as Delage and Talbot, but also vehicles from Peugeot, Renault and Citroen.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E37 Offroad for Everybody
programme.desc: Opel's Insignia Tourer Country was the German brand's first family car in outdoor attire. In addition: with the Capture Renault presented their first compact SUV. And: what happens when Fiat's cute compact 500 is inflated to the 500L Trekking?

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E51 Open Air Concert
programme.desc: As an homage to driving top-down we took a look at three of the most beautiful convertibles. The animalistic sound of the Audi S3 convertible's 4-cylinder is astonishing. But what about the Nissan 370 Z Roadster? Or Porsche's Boxster GTS?

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Mercedes SLS vs Audi R8
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi once again invite the owners of the most extraordinary cars to Dubai, where they award points for speed, style and sound. This time, they will be joined by a limited edition Mercedes SLS and an Audi R8.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 BMW X6M vs Nissan Patrol
programme.desc: At Jumeirah Beach in Dubai, car owners can have their souped-up vehicles judged in three categories and win an overnight stay at the Sofitel Hotel. This time, a BMW X6M, a Ford F250 and a Nissan Patrol are in the running.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E104 Lamborghini
programme.desc: Sant'Agata Bolognese, the home of the iconic Italian sports car manufacturer Lamborghini, is the perfect place to take a look under the hood of the different Gallardo models. Also: cruising through Rome in an Aventador LP700-4.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E94 Audi at Le Mans
programme.desc: At the 2012 Le Mans 24 Hours, Audi entered the R18 e-tron quattro for the first time. Also: the Porsche Cayenne GTS, the model between the S and the Turbo. And: the Mercedes-Benz CLS Shooting Brake.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Episode 17
programme.desc: The RCN Challenge is the ultimate BMW driving experience. We also paid a visit to the Devils Diner, the track's indoor meeting place for drivers.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Episode 18
programme.desc: After the 24-hour race was over we left the Nuerburgring and moved to Büren, Germany, where the Raeder Motorsport company is based. They are famous for front-wheel drives with a great performance that put a lot of horsepower to the track.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 The Remote Control
programme.desc: Stuntman Tobi operates an Artega GT at full speed via remote control. This is just a warm-up before the big stunt, in which he drives a car up a steep ramp at 68 mph. The question is: How high can remote-controlled cars fly?

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S02 : E31 Stunt Highlights
programme.desc: Stunt coordinator Christoph looks back at the stunts of the last twelve shows and explains why a stunt sometimes works better in a test than on the film set. It's a summary of all the stunts of season 2, in addition to the best outtakes.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Nova SS vs Honda Accord
programme.desc: On Put Your Car On TV, car fans from the Middle East can have their darlings rated in terms of speed, style and sound. Included this time: a Nova SS, a special Honda Accord and a car clad in crystals.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Lamborghini Aventador vs GMC Chevrolet
programme.desc: The "Walk" at JBR in Dubai is the venue for our competition, as far as fancy and luxurious cars from all over the Middle East are concerned. This time, a Lamborghini Aventador and a GMC Chevrolet are among the participants.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E156 Sports SUVs
programme.desc: Three extraordinarily sporty SUVs are the Porsche Macan Turbo, the Mercedes GLA 45 AMG and the Audi RSQ3. Each of these is able to easily cope with each season of the year and, in regards to performance, could be mistaken for a sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E152 La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: With the Alfieri, Maserati in 2014 celebrated their anniversary with the introduction of a beautiful grand tourer. In remembrance and as part of the three-day celebration, Maserati organised a cruise from Bologna to Torino with some of their most iconic cars.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E31 Women and their Classic Cars
programme.desc: A small group of car enthusiastic ladies offers resistance in the otherwise man dominated classic car world. One of them is Johanna. The 24-year-old loves her 1969 Corvette more than everything.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E38 Scrapyard Gold
programme.desc: It is not too unusual to find hidden gems of automotive history in a perfect condition in barns or scrap yards. Also: the MGC GT Sebring, that was built for the 12 Hours of Sebring race.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E78 Iconic Racing Classics
programme.desc: Cars like the Ford GT 40, the Jaguar D-Type or the Mercedes 300 SL wrote history on the race track and now break records at auctions. A sumptuously restored 300 SL will start at the most famous classic car rally in the world, the Mille Miglia.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E33 Sportscars for the Masses
programme.desc: The Ford Mustang has been an icon for decades. What makes this car so special? In addition: the Nissan 370 Z Nismo is half as expensive as a Porsche 911, but its power is on par with the German flagship. And: the 7th generation Volkswagen Golf GTI and R.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E35 Electrically into the Future
programme.desc: The Tesla Model S is an icon for inventiveness and boldness. In addition: the BMW i3 was the first car from Germany that completly relied on electric propulsion. And: Citroen gave their glimpse into the future with the DS 5 Hybrid.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E80 Ferrari FF
programme.desc: The Ferrari Four, also called Ferrari FF, is the first four-wheel family car from Maranello. Also: the BMW M5 shines both as a family and business car. And: the Mercedes-Benz SL is a roadster drivers' dream.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E120 When Sports Meets Indulgence
programme.desc: Luxury class grand tourers with four doors. Porsche introduced their Panamera as a Plugin Hybrid or equipped with new turbo engines. BMW responded with their M6 Gran Coupe. German engineering at its finest.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Salto Mortale
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes face a new mission: performing a front-flip through the air with a stuntman behind the wheel of an estate wagon. Stuntmen Daniel and Lars display a brilliant fight choreography in some spectacular driving scenes.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 The Remote Control
programme.desc: Stuntman Tobi operates an Artega GT at full speed via remote control. This is just a warm-up before the big stunt, in which he drives a car up a steep ramp at 68 mph. The question is: How high can remote-controlled cars fly?

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Episode 21
programme.desc: In this episode, we focused on Phoenix Racing, the successful team from the Eifel Region that rocked the DTM.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Episode 11
programme.desc: Spring finally melted away the snow on the track and racing life returned to the Nuerburgring. Drivers with gasoline in their veins started chasing their cars around the ring again.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E84 Kelleners KS1 RS
programme.desc: The BMW One M Coupe from the former race-driver Ralf Kelleners: the KS1 RS is one of the highlights in 2012. Also: another big score from Porsche, the beautiful 911 cabriolet. And: the Bentley Continental GT V8 is a dream car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E106 Porsche to the Max
programme.desc: The Techart Grand GT by Porsche's house tuner is a souped-up Panamera. But the off-the-shelf GTS model also has its treats. Patrick Simon took this monster to the track. In addition: Ruf's anniversary model RT 35. And: the 911 Carrera 4.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 BMW Motorrad Berlin
programme.desc: The first vehicle that BMW ever produced was a motorcycle, the R23. We take a look at the brand's motorcycle factory in Berlin. Also: the KTM 125 Duke, a bike that isn't just for beginners. And: the "Night of the Jumps", an exciting freestyle motocross spectacle at Munich's Olympiahalle.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 Blacktrail E-Bike
programme.desc: The Blacktrail by PG Bikes is the fastest and lightest E-bike in the world, but also the most expensive. What's behind this exciting power package from Regensburg, Germany? Also: is BMW's new flagship bike, the K 1600 GT with 6 cylinders really worth its price and is it able to stand up to the competition by Honda, Kawasaki and Benelli?

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Episode 22
programme.desc: At the Nuerburgring Patrick chased a 12-cylinder Aston Martin Zagato down the track. Also on the show: a Hummer, a Renault Clio and a Frenchman in a Ferrari.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Episode 21
programme.desc: In this episode, we focused on Phoenix Racing, the successful team from the Eifel Region that rocked the DTM.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E71 Mobility in Eastern Europe
programme.desc: In the 1950s, companies like Tatra from Czechoslovakia introduced advanced, even pioneering automobiles. The clientele was exclusive, which is why now these streamlined cars are big rarities. We tracked down the owner of a 1937 Tatra T87.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Fiat Dino
programme.desc: The Fiat Dino Spider is one of the most beautiful cabriolets of the 1960s. Its impeccable design was created by Pininfarina, and only 525 units were built. Under its hood growls a Ferrari V6 engine.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 The Most Exciting Classic Car Races
programme.desc: Exciting GT sports cars from the 1960s, the pre-war Silver Arrows, hot classic cars on ice and historic Formula 1 cars. We present the most exciting classic car races in Germany.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Cruising
programme.desc: We explored how the Z4 Roadster feels as a cabriolet. Also: the small company Boom Trikes Automotive have become Europe's leading trike manufacturer. And: cruising through Los Angeles in a Volkswagen Beetle convertible.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E29 Diesel Engines
programme.desc: It's all about Diesel this time. We compared the BMW 120d and the 125i. In addition: Audi's diesel-hybrid model R18 e-tron quattro dominated the endurance race in Le Mans. And: the diesel-powered Jaguar XF Sport Brake.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E73 McLaren MP4 12C GT3
programme.desc: McLaren's MP4 12C GT3 is as fast as a Formula One car. We explored how this super sports car came to be. Also: the German company Mechatronik specializes in restoring rare and classic cars like the Mercedes W111.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E74 Supercars of the Frankfurt Motor Show
programme.desc: We took a look at the IAA Frankfurt 2011 highlights, like the new Porsche 911, Mercedes' SLS AMG Roadster, the Bentley Continental Convertible, a 1,100 hp monster from Croatia and others.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Episode 10
programme.desc: Christian Menzel asked our presenter Miriam to participate in a driver safety training where he showed tips and tricks on what to do in emergency situations.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Episode 11
programme.desc: Spring finally melted away the snow on the track and racing life returned to the Nuerburgring. Drivers with gasoline in their veins started chasing their cars around the ring again.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Chevy Camaro vs Mercedes SLS AMG
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi invite car freaks from the Middle East to show off their souped-up vehicles on the "Walk" at Jumeirah Beach in Dubai. In this episode, a Chevrolet Camaro competes against a Mercedes SLS AMG.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 BMW X5 vs Mercedes SLK 230
programme.desc: If you like souped-up and luxuriously equipped vehicles, Jumeirah Beach in Dubai is the place to be. There, the cars are judged and there is also something to win. This episode features a BMW X5 and a Mercedes SLK 230.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E73 McLaren MP4 12C GT3
programme.desc: McLaren's MP4 12C GT3 is as fast as a Formula One car. We explored how this super sports car came to be. Also: the German company Mechatronik specializes in restoring rare and classic cars like the Mercedes W111.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E74 Supercars of the Frankfurt Motor Show
programme.desc: We took a look at the IAA Frankfurt 2011 highlights, like the new Porsche 911, Mercedes' SLS AMG Roadster, the Bentley Continental Convertible, a 1,100 hp monster from Croatia and others.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Lamborghini Aventador vs GMC Chevrolet
programme.desc: The "Walk" at JBR in Dubai is the venue for our competition, as far as fancy and luxurious cars from all over the Middle East are concerned. This time, a Lamborghini Aventador and a GMC Chevrolet are among the participants.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Nova SS vs Honda Accord
programme.desc: On Put Your Car On TV, car fans from the Middle East can have their darlings rated in terms of speed, style and sound. Included this time: a Nova SS, a special Honda Accord and a car clad in crystals.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Episode 16
programme.desc: In this episode we invite you to witness the progress of driver Uwe Nittle as he got ready for qualifying at the Truck Grand Prix.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Episode 11
programme.desc: Spring finally melted away the snow on the track and racing life returned to the Nuerburgring. Drivers with gasoline in their veins started chasing their cars around the ring again.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E61 Classic Cars with All-Wheel Drive
programme.desc: The Volkswagen Type 166 amphibious vehicle is the all-rounder amongst off-road vehicles. Also: the Peugeot 205 Turbo 16 all-wheeler turned the World Rally Championship in the 1980s on its head. And : the Willys Jeep in our drive report.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E71 Mobility in Eastern Europe
programme.desc: In the 1950s, companies like Tatra from Czechoslovakia introduced advanced, even pioneering automobiles. The clientele was exclusive, which is why now these streamlined cars are big rarities. We tracked down the owner of a 1937 Tatra T87.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E52 The big journey
programme.desc: The Mercedes-AMG E63 S is a wolf in sheep's clothing. This station wagon has more power than the Nissan GTR 'Godzilla'. Also: the Porsche Panamera GTS feels at home on the motorway and on the race track. And: Audi's powerful all-purpose executive car RS6.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E55 Pulse Rising Cars
programme.desc: With the Pulsar, Nissan returned to the European compact class market with a serious contender to the Volkswagen Golf. In addition: the American V8 dream sports car, the Chevrolet Corvette C7. And: Subaru's fifth-generation rally icon, the WRX STI.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Mercedes ML 63 AMG
programme.desc: We put the Porsche Cayenne Turbo S and the Mercedes ML 63 AMG to the test. Also: the final round of the truck trial race at the Camp4fun at the Nürburgring in Germany. And: General Motors' new luxury SUV, the Cadillac SRX.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Outback Off-Road Adventure
programme.desc: Australia's North-East is famous for its nature and wildlife. We accompanied the Germans Katrin and Uli on their 4x4 tour on the Great Tropical Drive in Queensland. Also: Clash of the Titans. We compared the Toyota Landcruiser and Mitsubishi Pajero.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Ready to Race with Ken Block
programme.desc: Whenever Ken Block is involved in the World Rallycross Championship, the audience goes crazy. Thanks to his spectacular “Gymkhana” drifting videos he became a superstar in the motorsports scene. Wherever he shows up, tires are smoking.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E40 Harley Sportster 1972
programme.desc: Harley-Davidson add three additions to their model range of bikes: the motorized wheelie bike Sportster 72, the versatile Switchback Dyna, and the bad-boy ride „Softail Slim“. Also: two German bikers take a dusty adventure ride through Mexico on their BMW's. And: the Triumph Speedmaster, the British answer to Harley-Davidson's cruiser.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 Triumph Thunderbird
programme.desc: The parallel twin-cylinder Triumph Thunderbird. Is the powerful 1.6 litre bike able to gain a foothold outside of the British Isles? Also: Harley-Davidson's black chopper Sportster 883 Iron, a starter bike for purists. And: Bike & Music, a spectacle for motorbike and stunt enthusiasts at Europe's biggest motorway rest area in Geiselwind, Germany.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E175 Strong, Light and Fast
programme.desc: The Porsche Cayman GT4 combined the best elements that Porsche could offer. In addition: the Audi R8 V10 plus, an even stronger, lighter and faster version of the original model.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E132 Hypercars
programme.desc: The Mc Laren MP4 12C, the Porsche 911 Turbo S and the Mercedes SLS AMG GT are super sports cars that are second to none. We put the pedal to the metal in these exciting and powerful driving machines.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Episode 10
programme.desc: Christian Menzel asked our presenter Miriam to participate in a driver safety training where he showed tips and tricks on what to do in emergency situations.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Episode 11
programme.desc: Spring finally melted away the snow on the track and racing life returned to the Nuerburgring. Drivers with gasoline in their veins started chasing their cars around the ring again.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E73 McLaren MP4 12C GT3
programme.desc: McLaren's MP4 12C GT3 is as fast as a Formula One car. We explored how this super sports car came to be. Also: the German company Mechatronik specializes in restoring rare and classic cars like the Mercedes W111.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E74 Supercars of the Frankfurt Motor Show
programme.desc: We took a look at the IAA Frankfurt 2011 highlights, like the new Porsche 911, Mercedes' SLS AMG Roadster, the Bentley Continental Convertible, a 1,100 hp monster from Croatia and others.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E157 Four Seatbelts for a Halleluja
programme.desc: The Porsche Panamera Turbo S is one of the most dynamic sedans in the world. In addition: the Jaguar XJR power sedan with a 550 hp V8 engine and Mercedes' extraordinary four-door coupe CLS 500.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Wildly through the desert
programme.desc: BMW and the German racing team X-Raid take part in the Dakar Rally with a transformed Mini Countryman. Also: the Mercedes G63 AMG 6x6, a 6-wheel off-road monster. And: the Kia Sportage feels both at home in the rocky terrain of Sicily and the city.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E39 Real Winners
programme.desc: When BMW released the X6 in 2008, many people doubted that this concept would be successful. We took a look at the second generation of this model in the M50d version. Also: test driving the best-selling Opel Mokka. And: the Mercedes GLE Coupe.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E49 Bizzarrini 5300 GT
programme.desc: Giotto Bizzarrini was the creator of the famous Ferrari GTO, but after arguments with his employer he left Ferrari early. To get back at Ferrari, Bizzarrini decided to create his own sports car: the Bizzarrini GT 5300.
